overview: BD 28 ELECTRONIC BLOOD DRAWING CHAIR 2 motors Electronic adjustments of backrest, footrest and Trendelenburg functions Synthetic leather upholstered seat and back surface Epoxy painted steel structure with ABS covered sub-frame and outer sides of chair Hand control unit Auto-contour Sitting position Relax position Bed position Detachable cushion Synthetic leather upholstered armrests Arm rest are horizontally and vertically adjustable Removable foot rest with length adjustment (optional) Height adjustable IV pole Antistatic swivel castors with and directional lock
